span.p: Does a ravenclaude-core agent already produce this deliverable type?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Could the core agent produce indistinguishable output if handed a domain skill and knowledge file?

span.p: Ship a skill plus inline prior on the core agent - no new agent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is this a generalist concern that splits cleanly into hygiene-stays-core and deep-craft-lives-in-plugin?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Keep the hygiene part in or routing to core - build the deep-craft plugin agent for the specialist half only - document the litmus test

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: New agent is justified - document the deliverable format and the absence of a core analog before shipping
